agent.status: Fixing the map on phones: the 'what's happening near you' panel was covering the middle of the map so you couldn't tap your own game. It now tucks into a little tap-to-open strip at the bottom. Also stood up a phone version of the automated test run so the report shows every screen on a phone too.
agent.direction: Running the full test suite on both desktop and phone to confirm it's all green, then putting the changes up for review.
